title: Korak 32

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        
        constraints = [
            (nums, '')
        ]        

    return password
    
# new_password = generate_password(8)
# print(new_password)
pattern = re.compile('l+')
quote = 'Not all those who wander are lost.'
print(pattern.search(quote))

import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        
        constraints = [
            (nums, '')
        ]        

    return password
    
# new_password = generate_password(8)
# print(new_password)
pattern = re.compile('l+')
quote = 'Not all those who wander are lost.'
print(pattern.search(quote))

tests.text: Treba da promeniš svoje izmene od pattern u niz stvarnih slova 'l+'.

description: Možete dobiti iste rezultate bez korišćenja funkcije compile(). Promenite vaše izmene od pattern u niz stvarnih slova 'l+'. Zatim, promenite poziv print() kako biste ispisali re.search(pattern, quote).
